ast.name: info
ast.source: Adding missing todos to today's note.
ast.target: 正在将缺失的待办事项添加到今日笔记。

ast.name: info
ast.source: Removing empty todos from today's note
ast.target: 正在从今日笔记中移除空的待办事项。

ast.name: info
ast.source: Loading Nested Daily Todos plugin
ast.target: 正在加载嵌套每日待办事项插件

ast.name: info
ast.source: Unloading Nested Daily Todos plugin
ast.target: 正在卸载嵌套每日待办事项插件

ast.name: info
ast.source: Today's Daily Note not found. Creating daily note for today
ast.target: 未找到今日每日笔记。正在为今天创建每日笔记。

ast.name: info
ast.source: Removing incomplete todos from previous notes that were carried forward
ast.target: 正在从先前笔记中移除被延续的未完成待办事项。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable this to check existing previous notes rather than days. For example, if set to check 1 previous day, and this option is enabled, the plugin will look for todos in the latest daily note, even if that note is older than 1 day.
ast.target: 启用此选项以检查现有的先前笔记，而不是按天数检查。例如，如果设置为检查前 1 天，并启用此选项，插件将在最新的每日笔记中查找待办事项，即使该笔记超过 1 天。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable this to group incomplete todos by any headings they are under. If disabled, or a previousheading is not found in today's note, the incomplete todos are ended to the end of today's note.
ast.target: 启用此选项以按任何标题对未完成的待办事项进行分组。如果禁用，或在今日笔记中未找到先前标题，则未完成的待办事项将被添加到今日笔记的末尾。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Remove empty todos from the updated note.
ast.target: 从更新后的笔记中移除空的待办事项。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Todo items with these values will be considered todos and carried forward if incomplete. If you use a theme or plugin that makes use of non-standard values like - [!] and you want that entry to carry forward, include "!" in this setting.
ast.target: 具有这些值的待办事项条目将被视为待办事项，如果未完成则会被延续。如果你使用了主题或插件，它们使用了非标准值（如 - [!]），并且你希望该条目被延续，请在此设置中包含 \"!\"。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Todo items with these values will be considered "compete" and won't carry forward.
ast.target: 具有这些值的待办事项条目将被视为“已完成”，并且不会被延续。

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Number of previous days to check for todos
ast.target: 检查待办事项的前几日天数

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Check previous existing notes instead of days
ast.target: 检查先前存在的笔记而非天数

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Group todos by section
ast.target: 按章节对待办事项分组

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Remove empty todos
ast.target: 移除空的待办事项

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Remove incomplete todos from previous notes
ast.target: 从先前笔记中移除未完成的待办事项

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Supported Todo characters
ast.target: 支持的待办事项字符

ast.name: setName
ast.source: "complete" Todo Values
ast.target: “已完成”待办事项值

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Failed to read the daily note template
ast.target: 读取每日笔记模板失败

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Unable to create new file.
ast.target: 无法创建新文件。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Running Nested Daily Todos
ast.target: 正在运行嵌套每日待办事项

ast.name: name
ast.source: Add previous incomplete todos
ast.target: 添加先前未完成的待办事项
